title: Spark Plug Replacement for NGK BPMR7A, L7T and for Champion CJ8 RCJ6Y RCJ7Y & More Types Sparkplug, Adefol Spark Plugs Fit for Stihl & Husqvarna Chainsaw Lawnmower Engines
features: Replaceable Models - Optimum quality spare par compatible with NGK BPMR7A, BPM7A, BM6A, L7T and so on. Also fit for Champion CJ8, RCJ6Y, RCJ7Y, CJ7Y, RCJ8 and for Bosch WSR5F, WS8E series sparkplug.

Compatible With - Reliable spark plug for Stihl MS170, MS180, 017, 018, TS400, TS410, TS420, TS460, etc. And for Husqvarna 61, 266, 268, 272, 272XP Chainsaw. Also fit 47CC, 49CC, 50CC 2-stroke engines.
Quite Durable - The outer insulator of spark plug is made of high grade alumina silicate ceramic, treated with corrosion resistant plating for longer life.
Higher Stability - Pure copper core could increase heat transfer and heat dissipation, easily reach a more reliable start and prevent the risk of overheating.
Quality Guarantee - Our spark plug is designed, engineered and tested to rigorous standards, for anything you are not satisfied, we would offer 100% refund.
description: Product Description for NGK BPMR7A L7T Spark Plugs Compatible with STIHL MS170 MS170C MS171 MS180 MS181 MS190T MS191T MS192T MS200 MS200T MS210 MS211 MS230 MS231 MS240 MS250 MS251 MS260 MS261 MS270 MS271 MS280 MS290 MS291 MS310 MS311 MS340 MS341 MS360 MS360C MS361 MS362 MS380 MS381 MS390 MS391 MS440 MS441 MS460 MS461 MS640 MS650 MS660 MS880 MSE140 MSE160 MSE220 TS400 TS410 TS420 TS460 TS700 TS800.
